rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relationship to Educ. Code §61.823, which governs field of study curricula at institutions of higher education. No overlapping subject matter exists.
quote: Sec. 61.823. FIELD OF STUDY CURRICULUM. (a) The board, with the assistance of advisory committees composed of representatives of institutions of higher education, shall develop field of study curricula.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
